Listato ministeriale A / B · vero o falso

Patente study console

Every statement in the official A/B listing is pre-labelled true or false. That lets us measure exactly which Italian words pull an answer toward VERO or FALSO — and drill the ones that trip people up.

Source: Listato A/B (Neca), web version 27/02/2025 · 7,144 statements · 708 blocks. Built as a revision aid · answers are the listing's own labels.
